head.title: Employment | MOONSTONE ADVOCATES
head.description: Facing a problem at work? Our Kampala employment solicitors provide clear advice on dismissal, discrimination, settlement agreements and more.
head.ogDescription: Facing a problem at work? Our Kampala employment solicitors provide clear advice on dismissal, discrimination, settlement agreements and more.

blocks.html:
Employment

Problems at work can feel overwhelming. Whether you’re facing dismissal, discrimination or being asked to sign a settlement agreement, it’s hard to know where you stand. That’s where we can help. Our Employment team advise individuals on all aspects of employment law. You’ll get clear, straight talking advice about your rights and your options. We’ll explain the process in plain English and make sure you understand what it means for you.

Employment

Services

Work issues affect more than your job. They affect your income, your reputation, and your well-being. Speak to us early, and let’s take practical steps to protect your position.

Speak to an expert

Breach of Contract and Unlawful Deduction from Wages Claims

We work with employees in all sectors to challenge breaches of contract and recover what you’re owed.

Contracts of Employment

A new job should feel like a fresh start, not a risk. If your contract’s unclear or unfair, we’ll help you make sense of it and negotiate better terms.

Disciplinary Proceedings

Facing a disciplinary meeting? We’ll help you stay calm, understand your rights, and protect your future.

Discrimination & Equality

Being treated unfairly at work? We’ll help you challenge discrimination and get the support you deserve.

Employment Tribunal Claims

If you’ve been treated unfairly at work, we’ll stand with you, guide you through the tribunal process and stand by you.

Flexible Working

Need more flexibility at work? We’ll help you make a request that works for you and make sure your rights are protected.

Holiday Pay

Holiday pay should be fair, accurate, and reflect your normal earnings from day one. If it’s not, we’ll help you put it right.

Redundancy

Facing redundancy is stressful, but you don’t have to face it alone, we’ll make sure the process is fair and your rights are protected from day one.

Restrictive Covenants

Restrictive covenants can feel limiting, but we’ll help you understand what’s enforceable, protect your position, and move forward with confidence.

Settlement Agreements

A settlement agreement shapes your exit from work, so we’ll make sure you understand every term, protect your rights, and secure the best outcome for you.

Unfair, Constructive, and Wrongful Dismissal

If you’ve been unfairly dismissed or pushed out of your role, we’ll help you take control, challenge what’s happened, and move forward with confidence.

Whistleblowing

Uganda law protects whistleblowers from dismissal, demotion, bullying, and other negative treatment and our job is to help you stay protected.

Workplace Grievances

When something’s gone wrong at work, we’ll help you raise it the right way and make sure your employer sticks to the rules.

Experts in every area

Georgia was incredibly helpful throughout the process of reaching a settlement with a previous employer. Georgia took the time to understand my personal situation and provided clear, considerate, and professional guidance at every stage. Her support made a complex process much easier to navigate, and I felt reassured knowing I was in capable hands.
